entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'AVX-512 GEMM kernel for matrix multiplication (replacing ggml's Q4_0 mul_mat)
Wire into inference pipeline (integrate with existing Win32 IDE)
Performance benchmarking against ggml baseline'
